title: Bounce Beat Boom
poem_text:
Boing boing, jump so high,
Bounce bounce, touch the sky.
Zing zing, lightning flash,
Crash crash, thunder clash.
Pop pop, bubbles fly,
Fizz fizz, tickle my eye.
Buzz buzz, bees all round,
Hum hum, sleepy sound.
cover_context: A glowing bedroom where bouncing balls turn into fireflies, lighting up the walls with playful sparks.
style_prompt: Children's musical poem, kalimba and gentle shaker, 101 BPM, bouncy and playful, fun energy that channels into rhythm, clear warm vocal, every word easy to understand
